# Lepton Demo MVP

[`.github/milestones/lepton-demo-mvp.md`](../../milestones/lepton-demo-mvp.md).

| ID    | Status | Title |
|-------|--------|-------|
| LD-001 | ✅ Closed | Scaffold @nanoproof/agent package |
| LD-002 | ✅ Closed | Lightweight citation matching (keyword overlap) |
| LD-003 | ✅ Closed | Attribution model — 60/25/15 split + atomic USDC |
| LD-004 | ✅ Closed | Settlement bridge — agent → /v1/payments/settle |
| LD-005 | ✅ Closed | /research page with 7 panels |
| LD-006 | ✅ Closed | /api/agent route — server-side proxy |
| LD-007 | ✅ Closed | Demo dataset — 5 Lepton-relevant sources |
| LD-008 | ✅ Closed | 5-min demo script with narration |
| LD-009 | ✅ Closed | Deployment plan — Vercel + Railway + Neon |
| LD-010 | ✅ Closed | GitHub milestone + 12 issues |

| LD-012 | 🟡 Open   | ArcScan receipt linking in the Payment Proof panel |
